ab: Ima ka snaw way?
Swayi tama mu ka hiya.
Ima ka qridin way?
Qbsuran mu qridin ka hiya.
Ima ka laqi way?
Swayi mu snaw ka hiya.
Wa qmpah manu ka bubu su?
ch: A:你的媽媽從事什麼工作?

ab: Wa mniq heytay ka hiya.
Wa qmpah manu ka tama su?
ch: A:你的爸爸從事什麼工作?

ab: Mptusa ka hiya.
Swayi su snaw ka hiya hu?
Uxay, dangi swayi mu snaw ka hiya.
ch: B:不是，他是我弟弟的朋友。
en: No, he is my younger brother’s friend.

ab: Qbsuran su qridin ka hiya hu?
Uxay, swayi mu qridin ka hiya.
en: No, she is my younger sister.

ab: Khnu knhbrawan hiyi sediq ka tnsapah dha?
en: How many people in their family?

ab: Rima hiyi ka kana tnsapah dha.
en: There are five people in their family.

ab: Piya hiyi laqi ka tnsapah namu?
en: How many children in your family?

ab: Kana nami balay tnsapah u niqan spac hiyi laqi.
en: There are four children in our family.

ab: Piya hiyi ka swayi su snaw mi swayi su qridin?
en: How many younger siblings do you have?

ab: Uka ka swayi mu snaw, niqan turu hiyi ka swayi mu qridin.
ch: B:我沒有弟弟，有三位妹妹。
en: I don’t have any younger brothers, but I have three younger sisters.

ab: Piya ka qbsuran su snaw mi qridin?
en: How many older siblings do you have?

ab: Uka qbsuran mu snaw mi qridin ka yaku.
en: I don’t have any older siblings.

ab: Piya hiyi tnswayi su snaw mi qridin ka isu?
en: How many siblings do you have?

ab: Uka tnswayi mu snaw mi qridin ka yaku.
Tnswayi namu ka yamu hu?
Iyaq, qbsuran mu snaw ka hiya.
Sediq tnpusu namu ka yamu hu?
Iyaq, sediq tnpusu nami ka yami.
Sediq Balay ka hiya uri hu?
Iyaq, Sediq Balay ka hiya uri.
ch: B:是的，她也是賽德克族人。
